session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 9353 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the provided arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [220 lines omitted] ...
155→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 157→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 195→ "error": null 210→## Error Case 224→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 242→ "error": null

## ❌ Dignified Code Simplifier Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-21 07:58:14 PT

Found 1 violation across 1 file. Inline comments posted for each.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ Frozen dataclasses - All compliant
✅ Pathlib usage - All compliant
✅ Absolute imports - All compliant
✅ LBYL exception handling - Found 1 violation
✅ Properties O(1) - All compliant
✅ Type hints - All compliant
✅ Indentation levels - All compliant

### Violations Summary
- `navigation.py:516`: EAFP pattern (conditional truthiness) should use explicit LBYL check for ctx.global_config

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py`: 1 violation

</details>", "body": "<!-- dignified-python-review -->

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-21 07:58:13 PT

Found 0 violations across 9 files. No inline comments needed.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL (Look Before You Leap) - Path operations check .exists() before .resolve()
✅ Exception handling - Only at boundaries with proper context
✅ Imports - All module-level, absolute imports, no re-exports
✅ Frozen dataclasses - @dataclass(frozen=True) on WorktreeLookupResult
✅ Keyword-only arguments - Functions with 6+ params use * separator (render_deferred_deletion_commands, etc.)
✅ No default parameters - Test classes use fakes for defaults
✅ Click patterns - click.echo() for output, SystemExit for errors
✅ Properties O(1) - No properties with I/O
✅ Indentation depth - All functions stay within 4 levels
✅ No re-exports - No __all__ declarations in changed files

### Violations Summary
None found.

### Files Reviewed
- : 0 violations
- : 0 violations
- : 0 violations
- : 0 violations
- : 0 violations
- : 0 violations
- : 0 violations
- : 0 violations
- : 0 violations
- : 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-21 07:58:13 PT**: No violations detected. Code follows dignified-python standards: proper LBYL patterns, frozen dataclasses, keyword-only args, click patterns, and absolute imports.

</details>", "body": "<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-03-21 07:58:12 PT

Found 0 violations across 12 files. This is a clean refactoring that moves navigation commands (up/down) to the erk-slots package.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- Universal tripwires → loaded docs/learned/universal-tripwires.md
- CLI tripwires → loaded docs/learned/cli/tripwires.md
- Testing tripwires → loaded docs/learned/testing/tripwires.md

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `subprocess.run` with check=True - None found
✅ `Path.home()` - None found in changed files
✅ `os.chdir()` - None found
✅ `import time` or `time.sleep()` - None found
✅ `@patch` or `monkeypatch` - None found in test files
✅ `raise RuntimeError` or `raise Exception` - None found

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
✅ Gateway ABC modifications - None (no ABC methods added)
✅ Discriminated union error handling - Compliant (uses Ensure pattern)
✅ Lightweight __init__ pattern - Compliant (frozen dataclasses used)
✅ Test doubles - Compliant (uses fakes, no monkeypatch)
✅ Business logic tests - Compliant (tests moved with implementation)

### Files Reviewed
- `packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/down_cmd.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/up_cmd.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/navigation.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/group.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_down_cmd.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_up_cmd.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_stack_navigation.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/cli/cli.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/cli/commands/navigation_helpers.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/cli/test_graphite_command.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/cli/test_help_formatter.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/cli/test_navigation_helpers.py`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-21 07:58:12 PT**: No violations detected. Clean refactoring moving navigation commands to erk-slots package.

</details>",
